info.title: HousingHub Admin API
info.description: Internal administration API — requires Admin JWT bearer token.

get.summary: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated admin.

put.summary: Updates the first and/or last name of the currently authenticated admin.

requestBody.description: Fields to update. Null fields are left unchanged.

put.summary: Changes the password of the currently authenticated admin.

get.summary: Returns a list of all admin staff members.

put.summary: Deactivates an admin staff member account.
put.description: Deactivated admins cannot log in. Use reactivate to restore access.

put.summary: Reactivates a previously deactivated admin staff member account.

get.summary: Returns a filtered, paginated list of customers.
get.description:
Only returns accounts with CustomerType = Customer (excludes owners, agents, and admins).
Supports search by name, email, or phone number; filter by KYC verification status and active status.

get.summary: Returns full details of a single customer including KYC and personal info.

delete.summary: Permanently deletes a customer account and all associated data.

put.summary: Approves or rejects a customer's KYC submission.

parameters.name: approve
parameters.description: True to approve, false to reject.

put.summary: Suspends a customer account (sets IsActive = false).
Reactivates a previously suspended customer account.

get.description:
Includes total customers, owners, agents, pending KYC count,
active listings, pending inspections and today's inspection count.

get.summary: Returns today's scheduled inspections with full property and customer details.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of activity items to return (default 20).

get.summary: Returns a filtered, paginated list of all inspections on the platform.
get.description:
Filter by status, scheduled date, property ID, or customer ID.
Each item includes property name, address, customer name, scheduled date/time, and request date.

get.summary: Returns full details of a single inspection.

put.summary: Confirms an inspection assignment on behalf of the property owner.
put.description:
Admin can confirm pending inspections without requiring the owner to act.
Uses a system admin ID as the authenticated user ID.

put.summary: Declines an inspection assignment on behalf of the property owner.

get.summary: Returns a filtered, paginated list of house owners and agents.
get.description:
Only returns accounts with CustomerType HouseOwner or Agent.
Supports search by name, email, or phone number; filter by KYC verification status and active status.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Optional: 1 = HouseOwner only, 2 = Agent only. Omit for both.

get.summary: Returns full details of a single owner/agent including KYC and personal info.

put.summary: Approves or rejects an owner/agent's KYC submission.

parameters.name: approve
parameters.description: True to approve, false to reject.

put.summary: Suspends an owner/agent account (sets IsActive = false).
Reactivates a previously suspended owner/agent account.

get.summary: Returns a filtered, paginated list of all properties.
get.description:
Returns property name, owner name, address, date posted, published status and availability.
Filter by publish state or availability; search by property title.

get.summary: Returns full details of a single property.

delete.summary: Permanently deletes a property (admin bypass — no ownership check).

put.summary: Publishes a property so it is visible to the public.
Unpublishes a property, hiding it from the public.

get.summary: Returns a filtered, paginated list of inspections for a specific property.
